stories.title: Most likely picks for every NBA lottery team
stories.summary: We have the odds, likely picks and best fits for prospects ahead of Sunday's NBA draft lottery.

stories.title: Sources: Knicks' Anunoby has hamstring strain
stories.summary: Knicks forward OG Anunoby has been diagnosed with a right hamstring strain and will be day-to-day, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Thursday.

stories.title: Family sighs: Boyd, hurt with kids, has surgery
stories.summary: Matthew Boyd underwent successful surgery on his left meniscus -- an injury suffered while playing with his kids -- and is set to miss at least a month, according to manager Craig Counsell.

stories.title: Copy of Yanks' Domínguez exits after crashing into wall
stories.summary: Yankees left fielder Jasson Domínguez crashed into the wall while catching a drive to lead off the first inning against the Rangers. He has been placed in the concussion protocol and is getting an MRI on his shoulder.

stories.title: Ex-Gamecocks QB Garcia has Stage 4 cancer
stories.summary: Former South Carolina quarterback Stephen Garcia announced on social media that he has been diagnosed with Stage 4 colorectal cancer.
